# init(_:onCompletion:)

**Initializer**

Creates a suggestions picker with button text defined by the given localized string key.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor @preconcurrency init(_ title: LocalizedStringKey, onCompletion: @escaping (JournalingSuggestion) async -> Void)
```

## Parameters

- **title**: A localized string key that describes the suggestion picker’s purpose in the context of your app.
- **onCompletion**: Code that you supply, which processes any suggestions that a person chooses in the picker.

## Discussion

This initializer creates a text view similar to the results of calling [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/SwiftUI/Text/init(_:tableName:bundle:comment:)]. See [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/SwiftUI/Text] for more information about localizing strings.

## Creating a suggestions picker

- **init(label:onCompletion:)**: Creates a suggestions picker within the given view.
- **init(_:onCompletion:)**: Creates a suggestions picker with button text defined by the given string.
